docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZARIPOVA, SOPHIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.98 FILED BY ZARIPOVA, SOPHIA AS TO DEFENDANT MOCHEL, JACOB DBA SUPER MOVERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SOPHIA ZARAPOVA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACOB MOCHEL IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF NAMED AN INCORRECT DEFENDANT; NEEDS TO RE-FILE WITH PROPER DEFENDANT IF SHE WISHES TO PROCEED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
